watchdog_ngos_searched: Democracy for the Arab World Now (DAWN)
notes: All 13 negative/reputational themes plus the watchdog/NGO monitoring list were searched separately (never combined). No critical or reputational coverage of Saudi Arabia from a non-excluded (non-Saudi-owned, non-Israeli) outlet could be date-confirmed as published 2026-07-20 or 2026-07-21. Nearest candidates were all out of window (e.g. ABC News 09 Jul, Al Arabiya 16 Jul, Al Jazeera 14 Jul; NGO material from earlier in 2026). No criticism was manufactured to fill the section.
